name: Clockwerk
description: I've a mind like a steel trap, and the physique to go with it!

abilities.name: Armor Power
abilities.description: Consumes a Chain Mail in Clockwerk's inventory and grants himself armor bonus. Grants bonus flat-percentage outgoing damage amplification per armor. Bonus: 4. Armor Bonus: 4. Damage Amp per Armor: 0.25%.

abilities.name: Battery Assault
abilities.description: Discharges high-powered shrapnel toward one random nearby enemy unit at a time, dealing damage and stunning the affected enemy unit. Search Radius: 275. Number of Targets: 1. Shrapnel Interval: 0.7 (0.45). Damage per Interval: 20/45/70/95 (45/70/95/120). Stun Duration: 0.1. Active Duration: 10.5. Cooldown: 24/22/20/18. Mana Cost: 75/80/85/90.

abilities.name: Power Cogs
abilities.description: While Overclocking, the entire Power Cogs forms a greater aura radius, and grants Clockwerk armor bonus within proximity of any Power Cog Cogs Spawn Distance: 215. Number of Cogs: 8. Hit Count: 2. Cogs Duration: 5/6/7/8. Aura Radius: 225. Duration: 5/6/7/8. Cooldown: 21/19/17/15. Mana Cost: 60/65/70/75.

abilities.name: Rocket Flare
abilities.description: While Overclocking, Clockwerk launches multiple rockets upon cast with increased damage and movement speed slow duration. This additionally increases the granted flying vision upon impact. Damage: 80/120/160/200. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Slow Duration: 0.4. True Sight Duration: 10. Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 35/40/45/50.

abilities.name: Overclocking
abilities.description: Applies a self-debuff that allows Clockwerk to increase the power of all his abilities' values. Applies a movement speed and attack speed slow once the duration runs out. While Overclocking, Jetpack grants additional movement speed and turn rate. Debuff Duration: 18. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Attack Speed Slow: 100. End Slow Duration: 3. Cooldown: 50. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Jetpack
abilities.description: Grants unobstructed movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed. However, this self-disarms and severely limits his turn rate. While Overclocking, Jetpack grants additional movement speed and turn rate. Move Speed Bonus: 20%. Disarm Duration: 6. Duration: 6. Move Speed Bonus: (40%). Cooldown: 16. Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Hookshot
abilities.description: Fires a rapid grappling device at the point-targeted location. If it latches on a unit, Clockwerk launches himself toward the unit, stunning and dealing damage. Cast Range: 2000/2500/3000. Max Travel Distance: 2000/2500/3000. Hook Speed: 4000/5000/6000. Hook Latch Radius: 125. Stun Radius: 175. Damage Radius: 175. Cooldown: 60/45/30 (50/35/20). Mana Cost: 100/125/150.
